summary: Verified URL fix: All customer-facing outgoing links now use EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://app.imonsocial.com instead of window.location.origin. Frontend loads correctly, backend short URL API preserves original URLs with app.imonsocial.com domain.

url_fix_for_customer_facing_links.summary: All window.location.origin usages for customer-facing URLs replaced with process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://app.imonsocial.com'
files_fixed: /app/frontend/app/l/[username].tsx - Line 51: link page URLs use EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL

remaining_window_location_origin.reason: This is for uploaded photo URL absolutization (internal images), not customer-facing outgoing links. EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL is checked FIRST as primary, window.location.origin is only a fallback for local dev.

api_tests_passed.POST /api/s/create: PASS - Short URLs created with original_url preserved
api_tests_passed.GET /api/s/{short_code}: PASS - Redirects to original app.imonsocial.com URL

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Frontend loads, URL fix verified via code review)

context_for_next_testing_agent: URL fix verified: All customer-facing outgoing links (review requests, share my card, showcase, link page, congrats cards) now use process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://app.imonsocial.com' instead of window.location.origin. The one remaining window.location.origin in contact/[id].tsx:1116 is for photo URL absolutization (internal images) and is acceptable since EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL is checked first. Backend short URL API correctly preserves original URLs with app.imonsocial.com domain.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered

note_about_short_url_domain: In preview environment, the short_url field in POST /api/s/create response points to preview domain because supervisor config sets APP_URL to preview domain. However, the original_url with app.imonsocial.com is correctly preserved and the redirect works correctly. In production, APP_URL will be set correctly by deployment platform.
